title: Measure login API response time to ensure it meets performance requirements
description: Validates that the /auth/login endpoint responds within the 500ms threshold at the 95th percentile under simulated load.
preconditions: A performance testing environment is configured.
A pool of at least 1000 test user accounts is available.

steps.description: 1. Configure a performance testing tool (e.g., k6, JMeter) to simulate 1000 concurrent users.
2. Create a script to send POST requests to the /auth/login endpoint with valid credentials from the user pool.
3. Run the test for a duration of 10 minutes.
4. Collect and analyze the response time metrics.

expected_result: The 95th percentile (p95) response time for the login request is less than 500ms. The overall error rate during the test is less than 1%.
